# Erogram — Full Site Documentation

> Erogram.pro is the #1 verified directory for discovering NSFW Telegram groups, channels, and AI companion bots.

## Site Structure

### Homepage (https://erogram.pro/)
The landing page showcasing the platform's key features, latest articles, newly added groups, and curated top lists. Includes a FAQ section answering common questions about the platform.

### Groups Directory (https://erogram.pro/groups)
The main browsable directory of NSFW Telegram groups. Users can:
- Filter by category (30+ categories)
- Filter by country (150+ countries)
- Sort by: newest, popular, most members, most views
- Search by keyword
- Paginated results at /groups/page/{number}

### Bots Directory (https://erogram.pro/bots)
A directory of AI companion bots and interactive Telegram bots. Supports the same filtering, sorting, and search as the groups directory. Paginated at /bots/page/{number}.

### Individual Group/Bot Pages (https://erogram.pro/{slug})
Each group and bot has a dedicated page showing:
- Name, description, category, and country
- Member count and view statistics
- User reviews and ratings
- Direct Telegram join link
- Related groups/bots suggestions
- Breadcrumb navigation (Home > Groups/Bots > Name)

### Top Lists (https://erogram.pro/best-telegram-groups)
Curated "Best of" lists organized by:
- Category: /best-telegram-groups/{category} (e.g., /best-telegram-groups/lesbian)
- Country: /best-telegram-groups/country/{country}
Each list shows the top 10 groups in that category or region.

### Articles (https://erogram.pro/articles)
Blog-style articles and guides. Each article at /articles/{slug} includes:
- Full article content with featured images
- Author information
- Related articles
- Sidebar with trending groups

### Country Pages
- Groups by country: /groups/country/{country}
- Bots by country: /bots/country/{country}

### Informational Pages
- About: https://erogram.pro/about
- Privacy Policy: https://erogram.pro/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://erogram.pro/terms
- Contact: https://erogram.pro/contact

### User Actions
- Submit a group or bot: https://erogram.pro/add
- User profiles: https://erogram.pro/profile (authenticated)

## Content Guidelines

- All listed groups and bots are manually reviewed before approval
- Content is labeled as adult/NSFW (RTA rated)
- Groups with reported violations are investigated and removed
- Users can report inappropriate listings

## API & Data

- Sitemap: https://erogram.pro/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://erogram.pro/robots.txt
- The site uses server-side rendering; all content is available in the initial HTML response

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is Erogram?
A: Erogram is the ultimate directory for discovering NSFW Telegram groups, channels, and AI companion bots. We curate and verify adult-oriented communities to help users find like-minded people and engaging AI companions.

Q: What's the difference between groups and bots?
A: Groups are community chat spaces where multiple people interact, while bots are AI-powered companions that provide personalized conversations and interactive experiences.

Q: Are all communities safe?
A: All groups and bots are verified and moderated to meet community standards. Content is regularly reviewed.

Q: How do I join a group or bot?
A: Click on any listing and follow the Telegram link. You'll be redirected to Telegram to join instantly.

Q: Is Erogram free?
A: Yes, browsing and joining groups/bots is completely free.

Q: How often is content updated?
A: New groups and bots are added daily from community submissions.

Q: Can I submit my own group or bot?
A: Yes, use the Add page (https://erogram.pro/add) to submit for review and approval.
